Device Editor
Known Devices
0 W / 0 A

Front face images are optional. If none is loaded, AV Designer uses the default Video Core faceplate style.

These are fixed chassis connectors. Drag a node type into an empty slot, or drag a new node type onto an existing connector to replace it.

Enable Swappable Cards in the Device tab to build reusable card node groups.

Cards are reusable groups of connectors. They do not have faceplates; they become real nodes only when installed into a chassis slot.

Enable Swappable Cards in the Device tab to add chassis card slots.

Drag a card chip into a slot to install it. Installed card connectors are shown in the preview and become connectable nodes on the canvas.

A saved system default is the reset point for this template. Use it for a generic chassis that users can return to after experimenting with card layouts.

Drag a node type into an empty slot, fixed connector, or card connector row.
Rack Builder

Default Devices

Created Racks
Publish Viewer Link

Publish creates a password-protected hosted viewer link for technicians. The viewer is read-only.

Node Builder

Thumbnails are stored as 100 x 100 PNGs in the node JSON. Default placeholders use Nodes/Thumbnails/blank.png.

Title Block

Preview updates as you type. The title block can be dragged on the canvas and will avoid overlapping other objects.
